REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PETITIONERS JOHN RIERA AND LAURA RIERA'S MOTION FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS TO REMOVE LIEN FROM PROPERTY THROUGH SECRETARY OF STATE IS OFF CALENDAR. INSUFFICIENT NOTICE PER CALIFORNIA CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTIONS 1005 AND 1013, AND MOVING PARTY FAILED TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.7(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

calendar.matters:
Mtn For Service Of Process To Remove Lien From Property Through Secretary Of State
Off Calendar Feb-05-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PETITIONERs JOHN RIERA and LAURA RIERA's Motion For Service Of Process To Remove Lien From Property Through Secretary Of State
is OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient notice per California Code of Civil Procedure sections 1005 and 1013, and moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.7(B). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Hearing For Release Of Property From Lien
Off Calendar Apr-02-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Laura and John Riera (415-312-5065) Petitioners in propria persona.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONERS JOHN RIERA and LAURA RIERA'S Notice Of Hearing For Release Of Property From Lien

is OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B. Additionally, Proof of Service as to Roy Fisk appears to reflect an incomplete substitute service (documents left with Steven Fisk), not a personal service on Roy Fisk, an individual.

Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)
